label: Wetlab Validation (Formulation)
description: Measure key physicochemical and functional parameters of the proposed formulation in the lab.

defaultInputs.name: Formulation Specification
defaultInputs.tooltip: Ingredient composition and percentage from the Formulate module.

defaultOutputs.name: Test Parameter
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Physical or functional parameter being tested.

defaultOutputs.name: Target Value
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Expected target range for the parameter.

defaultOutputs.name: Status
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Pass / Fail / Marginal based on target range.

configSchema.label: Test Parameters
configSchema.tooltip: Select the parameters to measure in the formulation wetlab.
